hero.subtitle: A student community where we develop our leadership skills together, gain an international perspective, and grow by creating together.

about.title: What is the Global Leaders Club?
about.description: The Global Leaders Club is a student community where we develop our leadership skills together, gain an international perspective, and grow by creating together.

vision.missionText: Global in thought, bold in action, and moving together!
vision.visionText: To create a community that thinks on a global scale, takes responsibility, and grows stronger by coming together with diverse perspectives.
vision.value1Desc: We think with a worldwide perspective and create solutions for local and global challenges.
vision.value2Desc: We don't hesitate to step outside our comfort zone and act with innovative ideas.
vision.value3Desc: We build a stronger community by bringing different perspectives together.
vision.value4Desc: We create space for every individual to discover and develop their leadership potential.

activities.title: Events & Projects
activities.subtitle: Through events, projects, workshops, and the strong bonds we create, we prepare together for the leadership journey of the future!
activities.item1Desc: Interactive workshops focused on leadership, communication, project management, and personal development.
activities.item2Desc: Inspiring conferences and panel discussions with expert speakers in their fields.
activities.item3Desc: Gaining experience by leading social responsibility and entrepreneurship projects.
activities.item4Desc: Building strong connections with students from different universities and countries.
activities.item5Desc: Preparing for your career journey with guidance from experienced professionals.
activities.item6Desc: Fun and bonding social activities that build team spirit.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: The passionate leaders who drive our club forward.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Contact us for your questions or collaboration proposals.
contact.joinDesc: Take the first step in your leadership journey by joining the Global Leaders Club family.
